title: Assertion failure when querying a Blob column with order by DESC
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_blob (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data BYTEA NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_blob (id, data, description) VALUES (1, decode('Sample Blob Data 1', 'escape'), 'First blob entry');
INSERT INTO test_blob (id, data, description) VALUES (2, decode('Sample Blob Data 2', 'escape'), 'Second blob entry');
SELECT data FROM test_blob ORDER BY data DESC;
SELECT id, data FROM test_blob WHERE description IS NOT NULL ORDER BY description DESC;
key_bug_features: Querying Blob column with order by DESC
